title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Chiffon, Unknown person #12, Luffy as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Relax and chase the straw hats

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're Chasing Bege!! They're 100% Planning on Killing Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They might have gotten rid of pudding already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But brother Peros, what about straw hats?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Of course, we're behind them, brother

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: corner straw hats' ship this way

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I'll go chase bege and Mama with Bavarois

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should've left it to us in the first place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't talk like that... everyone ready to fight

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: loaded with the bunch of them waiting

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's rare, but looks like they acknowledged us as strong enemies,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're pulling out all the stops

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we fight their fleet there's no way we can win

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Trying to get away, let alone kill big mom no idea what it is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We are paying back a favor

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just believe in the cake. That chef's an amazing

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: I love that about you chiffon

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will get there right around 1 o'clock as we promised

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't know where and when luffy will come out from cacao Island

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there's no way to warn him of the danger outside

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
